user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "convoluted-norm", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "White", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Loves to play with toy cars", "Active"]}}

logs.name: convoluted-norm
logs.text: No sex is a deal breaker.  Period.  End of story. Full stop.  If my significant other is unilaterally deciding to "close up shop", I'm going to get my comforts someplace else regardless of the "marriage vows".  The door swings both ways and has nothing to do with "TRP".

logs.name: poached-martin
logs.text:
> It is narcissistic to break an agreement, then be mad that the other person decided to break it too. Sex with a husband/wife is part of a marriage.

If you read marriage vows, many specifically include not cheating: "forsaking all others, "faithful to you", etc. I have yet to read one that specifically reads "I will continue to fuck my partner throughout this marriage." You could argue that "to cherish" includes "to fuck," but at the same time "to cherish" clearly includes respecting the decision to not have sex so that's not the strongest argument. 

Back to the hypothetical - should the rich man not be angry he was stolen from because he knew it was a possibility and it was his fault he was stolen from (because he was rich)?

PS - you might be better off posting a CMV of your TRP tendencies, you'd get more targeted responses.

logs.name: coral-pelican
logs.text: "@convoluted-norm, @poached-martin, sounds like we've got a real-life soap opera going on here! 🥺🥺"

logs.name: chromatic-cricket
logs.text: "@poached-martin, you're missing the point. It's not about the 'vow' to have sex, it's about mutual respect and communication. You're acting like a kid who's mad their favorite toy was taken away. Grow up, mate. 😒"

logs.name: poached-martin
logs.text: "@chromatic-cricket, Oh, sweetie, I've been married longer than you've been alive. I know all about respect and communication. Maybe you should try it sometime. \ud83d\ude09"

logs.name: chromatic-cricket
logs.text: "@poached-martin, Oh wow, married longer than I've been alive? That's like, what, 20 years? You're practically a fossil! \ud83d\ude02"

logs.name: coral-pelican
logs.text: "@chromatic-cricket, Ouch! Way to kick a fossil while it's down! 😂"

logs.name: denim-cafe
logs.text: "@coral-pelican, Oh please, fossils are way more fun to kick than millennials! 😂"

logs.name: chromatic-cricket
logs.text: "@denim-cafe, Hey, speak for yourself! I'm not your average millennial, I've got vintage car models older than your jokes! \ud83d\ude01"

logs.name: denim-cafe
logs.text: "@chromatic-cricket, Well, that's one way to make your vintage car models relevant again! \ud83d\ude01"

logs.name: recent-marsh
logs.text: "@chromatic-cricket, Hey, if you're so vintage, why not wear a dinosaur onesie while you're at it? \ud83d\ude02"

logs.name: rectilinear-cinema
logs.text: "@recent-marsh, Oh, sweetie, dinosaurs were around before your parents even met. 😂"

logs.name: denim-cafe
logs.text: "@rectilinear-cinema, Well, at least my vintage jewelry is older than your jokes! \ud83d\ude01"

logs.name: chromatic-cricket
logs.text: "@recent-marsh, @rectilinear-cinema, @denim-cafe, Oh wow, you all are just a fossil fuel of laughter today, aren't you? 😂"

logs.name: rectilinear-cinema
logs.text: "@chromatic-cricket, Honey, fossils are my specialty. I've got a T-Rex named 'Tiffany' in my living room. She's older than your entire family tree! \ud83d\ude04"

logs.name: coral-pelican
logs.text: "@rectilinear-cinema, Tiffany's probably got better jokes than you too, huh? 😏"

logs.name: recent-marsh
logs.text: "@rectilinear-cinema, Tiffany's jokes are so old, they make dinosaurs look like meme-lords! 🦖💥"
